rulings.Case Title: BRENDA OCHOA et al VS. ERLINDA SAN JUAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFFS BRENDA OCHOA, EVE SEGASTURE, JENNER OCHOA, and MICHAEL CIOFALO'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees On Appeal: GRANTED in the amount of $17,425 for attorneys' fees and $700 for costs. Request for a multiplier is denied. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA ELENA PENARANDA et al VS. JONAS ROWE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014, Line 2: PETITIONERS MARIA PENARANDA and MARK CORNANDER's Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Attorney Fees And Costs: GRANTED. Final Arbitration award is confirmed. Request for fees and costs incurred in conjunction with this action is granted in the amount of $1,700. No opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN STONE INVESTMENT LLC VS. GABRIEL XIANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANTS GABRIEL XIANG and JENNY XIANG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer under CCP 1161a. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN STONE INVESTMENT LLC VS. GABRIEL XIANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 19, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANTS GABRIEL XIANG and JENNY XIANG'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: DENIED. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Plaintiff is barred from dismissing an action without prejudice and bringing a new action after Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment had been denied for failure to shift burden. (501/REQ)
